description: Create a three-column content slide on how JPMF provides differentiated access to private equity through a simplified structure, with columns for Access, Performance, and Simplicity using bullet lists.

header.headline: JPMF provides differentiated access to private equity through a simplified structure

items.text: Unlocking the benefits of a large PE market with proven results
Powered by the largest financial institution in the world
Consistent results across multiple market cycles
Active relationships with top quartile managers
Concentration in secondaries and co-investments provides j-curve mitigation

items.sub: Accessible to Qualified Clients; Lower investment minimums; No capital calls; Monthly subscriptions; Potential quarterly liquidity; Simplified tax reporting (1099)

footer.source: 1 Includes tenure & investing experience at both PEG and AT&T Investment Management Corporation (ATTIMCO). 2 As defined in the Investment Advisers Act of 1940. Either (1) an individual who is making an investment in the Fund of at least $1.1 million or after purchase of the Fund has at least $1.1 million under the management of JPMIM. (2) An individual who has a net worth of $2.2 million or more, either individually or jointly with a spouse, immediately before entering into an advisory contract, not including the value of their primary residence. See the prospectus for more information. Past performance is not a reliable indicator of current and future results.
